en_title: What Can We Expect from GTA 6 Online, and When Will We Play It?
subtitle: 最快也要等上一个月
opus_summary: 《GTA6》预购开启，但线上模式仍悬而未决。参考前作，《GTA6》Online可能一个月后以beta上线，或效仿《荒野大镖客：救赎2》于2027年5月正式推出。其付费方式与发布时间将影响多款大作发行窗口。

paragraphs.en: I’m sure you’ve heard by now, but GTA 6 pre-orders are now live. And with that announcement came the explicit wording from developer Rockstar that it is “a single-player” experience. That leaves a lot of questions about what the next iteration of GTA Online will look like, how much extra it will cost (if anything), and when we’ll be able to play it.
paragraphs.cn: 想必各位已经听说了，《GTA6》预购现已开启。伴随这一消息，开发商Rockstar明确将其描述为一款「单人」游戏。这不禁让人猜测：下一代《GTA Online》会是什么样？要额外花多少钱（如果有的话）？我们又何时能玩上？

paragraphs.en: I won’t lie to you, I have absolutely no concrete information about either of these points – Rockstar hasn’t even confirmed that there is a new GTA Online. We all just believe it’s inevitable because a) the current version is a globe-dominating money maker, and b) Rockstar’s two biggest games of the last two generations have both had MMO-like multiplayer modes. But this lack of an official announcement is not going to stop me from theorising – there’s much we can learn by looking back at how the original GTA Online was rolled out and how Rockstar then handled Red Dead’s equivalent.
paragraphs.cn: 老实说，我对这两点毫无确切消息——Rockstar甚至还没确认会有新的《GTA Online》。我们都认定它必然会出现，因为：a)当前版本仍是全球吸金巨兽；b)Rockstar过去两代主机上最大的两款游戏都带有MMO式的多人模式。不过，官方虽未公布，并不妨碍我大胆推测——回顾初代《GTA Online》的上线历程，以及Rockstar如何处理《荒野大镖客：救赎》的线上模式，我们能发现不少线索。

paragraphs.en: GTA 5 was first released back on September 17, 2013. To give people time to play through its multi-protagonist campaign, GTA Online arrived two weeks later. But maybe it shouldn’t have. Launched in a nearly unplayable state, it would take several weeks and patches for it to find its feet. Since then, though, it's been nothing short of a smash success, steadily building an impressive catalogue of missions, heists, and user-generated content updates that have turned it into the beast it is today. So, could whatever GTA 6’s online mode arrive within a similar timeframe? Will we be teaming up on the streets of Vice City on December 3? That seems unlikely.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA5》最初于2013年9月17日发售。为了让玩家有时间通关其多主角剧情，《GTA Online》在两周后上线。但也许当初不该那么急。上线时几乎没法玩，经过数周和多次补丁才算站稳脚跟。然而自那以后，它便一路势不可挡，逐渐积累起令人瞩目的任务、抢劫和用户生成内容更新，才成就了如今的巨兽。那么，《GTA6》的线上模式是否也会在类似的时间窗口内推出？我们能在12月3日于罪恶都市街头组队吗？这看起来可能性不大。

paragraphs.en: Firstly, Rockstar just doesn’t need to rush it out, with GTA 6’s single-player campaign already set to eclipse the sales of any video game launch to date. Why push Online out there within that late November window when you could profit from another whole hype cycle later on?
paragraphs.cn: 首先，Rockstar根本无需操之过急，因为《GTA6》的单人战役本身就足以打破任何游戏首发销量纪录。既然晚些时候还能再掀一轮炒作热度，何必非要在11月底窗口期就把线上模式推出来？

paragraphs.en: At the very earliest, I expect Online to arrive around a month after GTA 6. I say that because Rockstar is including a month’s membership to GTA+ with pre-orders, the subscription service that offers access and bonuses to its library of games. So, could GTA 6 Online devilishly arrive when most players’ free trial is just a day or two from ending, thus convincing many to keep paying for the service? Especially if that service comes loaded with some really tempting new extras for GTA 6 Online’s launch. We’ve already seen the extras bundled with the Ultimate Edition and how they’ve already tempted pre-orders. Would players diving into the new version of Online want to do it without the GTA+ bonuses?
paragraphs.cn: 我个人预计，《GTA6》的线上模式最快也要在游戏发售约一个月后才会推出。我之所以这么说，是因为Rockstar随预购附赠了一个月的GTA+会员资格——这项订阅服务可让玩家畅享游戏库并获取奖励。那么，《GTA6 Online》会不会很‘阴险’地赶在大部分玩家的免费试用期只剩一两天时上线，从而诱导玩家续费？尤其如果这项服务还搭配了针对《GTA6 Online》发布的诱人新福利。我们已经看到终极版附赠的额外内容对预购产生了怎样的诱惑。难道有玩家愿意在缺少GTA+奖励的情况下去体验新版Online吗？

paragraphs.en: A month-long wait would also parallel Red Dead Online, which arrived almost exactly a month after Red Dead Redemption 2. It did so in a beta state, however, with Rockstar having learned some of the lessons from GTA Online’s rocky launch. It wasn’t until six months later, in May 2019, that Red Dead Online graduated to its 1.0 form. So, could a similar path be followed here for GTA 6 Online? A good number of games scheduled for early 2027 will certainly be hoping so.
paragraphs.cn: 一个月的等待期也与《荒野大镖客：救赎2》线上模式类似，后者几乎正好在游戏发售后一个月上线，但当时是以测试版形式推出，Rockstar显然吸取了《GTA Online》首发时的教训。直到六个月后的2019年5月，《荒野大镖客：救赎2》线上模式才升级为1.0正式版。那么，《GTA6 Online》会不会也照此路径行事？不少定档2027年初的游戏肯定都在期盼如此。

paragraphs.en: If GTA 6’s iteration of Online was to follow Red Dead’s blueprint and launch properly in May 2027, then the flurry of big games already settling in for February and March will be relieved at the breathing room this gives them. The likes of Fable, Final Fantasy 7 Revelation, and Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis will feel like they can hold firm with their current release dates. However, it would be bad news for publishers currently planning for a spring release – we’ve already seen a pile-up of releases make September a daunting proposition due to publishers giving the single-player side of GTA 6 a wide berth, so the last thing devs working on upcoming games need is the (probably) next biggest multiplayer game of all time landing during their planned window.
paragraphs.cn: 如果《GTA6》的线上模式真照搬《荒野大镖客：救赎》的路线，于2027年5月正式上线，那么已经挤在2、3月的一大批大作就能松口气了。《神鬼寓言》、《最终幻想7 Revelation》以及《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗迹》这类游戏会觉得可以坚守原定发售窗口。然而，对那些正规划春季发售的发行商来说，这可不是好消息——我们已经看到，为了给《GTA6》单人模式让路，大量游戏扎堆9月，让这个月份堪称恐怖。而正在开发新作的团队最不希望看到的，就是这（可能）史上第二大的多人游戏正好落在他们规划的窗口期。

paragraphs.en: This threat – that GTA 6 gets effectively two launches – possibly also explains why so many games haven’t yet given firm release dates. The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake is due this year, but we don’t know when. God of War: Laufey is another that will want its own time in the spotlight, so I wouldn’t be surprised if Sony is waiting for the other GTA shoe to drop first before locking in a date.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》实际上有两次‘发售’这一威胁，或许也解释了为什么大量游戏至今仍未敲定具体发售日。《塞尔达传说 时之笛》重制版预计今年推出，但我们不知道具体何时。《战神：劳菲》同样渴望独享聚光灯，所以如果索尼正在等着《GTA6》这颗雷先引爆，再敲定自家日期，我一点也不会感到意外。

paragraphs.en: As for what GTA 6 Online may actually look like, well, that’s very much in the air. Will it once again be part of the GTA package you purchase when you pick up the single-player, or will it be its own game? Will a standalone game be free-to-play, financed through the gargantuan profits of the campaign and an endless supply of Shark Cards, or will it demand another premium price tag, or even a subscription to GTA+? Rockstar steadfastly refuses to discuss Online at all, so we’ve no idea, although we can take a reasonable guess at the shape of some things. For example, I wouldn’t expect it to completely replace the existing GTA Online, seeing as PC players still have no idea when they’ll be able to get their hands on GTA 6, and with so many people still enjoying their games on the previous generation of PS4 and Xbox One consoles, it would be foolish for Rockstar to shut down those Shark Card-infested microtransaction waters.
paragraphs.cn: 至于《GTA6 Online》实际会是什么样，嗯，目前纯属未知。它会再次作为购买单人模式时附带的《GTA》整体内容包的一部分，还是独立成章？若独立发行，会是靠战役的巨额利润和无穷无尽的鲨鱼卡内购来支撑的免费游戏，还是需要单独购买，甚至要求订阅GTA+？Rockstar坚决不愿谈论Online的任何细节，因此我们一无所知，不过有些事的走向倒是可以合理推断。比如，我不认为它会完全取代现有的《GTA Online》，毕竟PC玩家至今不知道何时才能玩到《GTA6》，而仍有大量玩家在上一代PS4和XBOX One主机上享受游戏，Rockstar若关闭这片挤满鲨鱼卡的微交易水域，未免太不明智。

paragraphs.en: In terms of gameplay, I think we can largely expect it to follow a familiar formula to what we’ve seen from GTA Online over the past decade. If it isn’t broke, don’t fix it, after all. But one thing I would expect is a further emphasis placed on user-generated content, which I wrote about in more depth here, as well as my concerns around it .
paragraphs.cn: 就玩法而言，我认为《GTA6 Online》大体仍会遵循过去十年里《GTA Online》那套成熟的配方。毕竟，没坏就别修，不是吗？但我预计有一点会被进一步强调，那就是用户生成内容，这一点我之前已撰文详细探讨过，同时也表达了我的担忧。

paragraphs.en: What do you think GTA Online will look like, and when do you think we’ll get to play it? Let us know in the comments!
paragraphs.cn: 你觉得《GTA Online》会是什么模样，又会在何时与我们见面呢？欢迎在评论区告诉我们！
